generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor current I_M on the MABI MAX 100 vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the cycloidal gearbox of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller‑provided output angle measurement of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

instance OutputAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data instances
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current I_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool, MQTTBroker
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor shaft position (angle) derived from MotorEncoderSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool, MQTTBroker
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox output position measured by GearboxEncoderSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool, MQTTBroker
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle reported by the controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool, MQTTBroker
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque τ calculated from motor current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity ω derived from successive position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from ω time derivative"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams of the vertical axis, motor, and gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox including friction‑free dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model combining Coulomb (static/kinetic) and viscous components for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck model capturing velocity‑dependent transition of friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl model representing pre‑sliding displacement behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for detailed gearbox friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model converting measured current I_M and motor parameters to torque τ"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance VelocityCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model deriving angular velocity ω from position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling used for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot axis"
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing the behavioral and friction models in real time"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, ParameterExtractionService, ModelUpdateService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker streaming live sensor data (current, positions, angles) to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AAS providing standardized integration of SysML and Simulink artifacts with the physical asset"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelUpdateService
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller executing the robot motion commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlImprovementService
]

instance WebDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing measured and simulated data for operators"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService, DeviationDetectionService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Streaming of sensor time‑series from the robot to the digital twin via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAvailabilityInsight
]

instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters in the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterDerivationInsight
]

instance ParameterExtractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extraction of friction model parameters from identified data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance ModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updating the digital twin models with newly identified parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured and simulated data on a web dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DeviationDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detection of deviations between simulated and measured robot behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationBetweenSimulationAndMeasurementInsight
]

instance ControlImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Applying updated friction parameters to improve motion‑control accuracy of the SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControllerParametersAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParameterDerivationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derivation of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters for the gearbox"
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of updated friction model parameters for the digital twin"
]

instance DeviationBetweenSimulationAndMeasurementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of deviations between simulated and measured robot behavior"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of time‑series data for operator monitoring"
]

instance DataAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation that live sensor data are available in the digital twin"
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateControllerParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update the SINUMERIK 840D controller with newly identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation synchronized with the robot’s sensor update cycle; data are processed continuously during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow (FrictionShadow) comprising a purpose object (FrictionDerivation), the asset (MABI axis), multiple DataTrace objects (measured I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out and simulated ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out), Processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) that execute the Simulink models, and linkage to engineering, data‑calculation and simulation model types according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated (runtime) stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is executing machining tasks to monitor and improve performance."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its source and processing component, use of both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) friction models, multi‑physics aware identification, and validation by comparing simulated friction‑free behavior with measured data to assess model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT; the Asset Administration Shell framework is employed for model‑data linking, but specific network protocols beyond MQTT are not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for model integration, SysML as an engineering modeling standard, and adherence to the Digital Shadow Reference Model (UML class diagram) for structuring the digital shadow."
]
